description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:latest Docker image. Define a before_script that runs apt-get -qq update, apt-get -qq install -y curl python3 python3-venv python3-pip npm nodejs, installs uv via curl https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh, sources $HOME/.local/bin/env, installs pebble-tool with uv tool install pebble-tool, and installs Pebble SDK 4.5 with pebble sdk install 4.5. Add a single stage named build and a build job that runs pebble build, stores the resulting *.pbw files from the build/ directory as artifacts that expire after one week, and caches the sdk directory using a key based on ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. The pipeline has no additional services or conditional rules.
